polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,250 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed:. Summarize overall market sentiment based on data. Provide numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

Data: Ethereum dip to $1,250 by Dec 31 2026: Yes 24% (vol $191,761). Bitcoin reach $72,500 in July: Yes 8% (vol $110,324). Bitcoin reach $67,500 in July: Yes 56% (vol $93,532).

Interpretation: Low probability for high Bitcoin target, moderate for lower target, low for Ethereum dip. Overall sentiment: Mixed or slightly bearish? The higher probability for Bitcoin reaching $67.5k (56%) suggests some optimism for moderate target, but low for $72.5k (8%) suggests skepticism for higher. Ethereum dip only 24% chance, meaning unlikely to dip low, so bullish for ETH? Actually probability of dip is low, so market thinks ETH will stay above $1.25k, bullish. So overall mixed: bullish on ETH, moderately bullish on BTC at $67.5k, bearish on BTC at $72.5k. So Mixed.

We need to mention numbers and names
